title: SquidServers Server-mod
description: A server side mod/plugin for custom item content and planks that can be drawn on
body:
# SquidServers Server-Mod
### Server-side Custom Content
---

## Key Features

* **Cosmetic Item and Blocks:** Adds recipies for skinned vanilla items, chose per player visual variants at "squidservers.com/itemshop".

* **Paintable Planks:** Craftable planks for every wood type. Use dyes on the painted face to draw on a 128x128 surface. This system is backed by vanilla maps, using stroke-based painting for a consistent UX across both Fabric and Paper.

---

## Platform Support

The same engine drives both versions to ensure your server behavior remains identical regardless of your choice of software.

| Platform | Technical Foundation | Compatibility |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Fabric** | Polymer + Fabric API | Fabric 1.20+|
| **Paper** | Bukkit API | Paper 1.20+ |

---

## Setup Guide
  * **Fabric:** Install the mod directly into your `mods/` folder (requires Fabric API).
  * **Paper:** Drop the plugin `.jar` into the `plugins/` folder.

* (required resource pack is automatiaclly applied and merged with others if needed)
---

## License and Credits

* **Branding:** "SquidServers" and related assets are unique branding for this pack.
* **Disclaimer:** Not affiliated with Mojang or Microsoft. Minecraft is a trademark of Mojang Synergies AB.
